updated: July 9, 2026. Day two, Thursday, in person 10 to 2, Workplace Foundations. Wednesday's first day is behind us. Watch the weather, DTE sent another storm alert for this afternoon into Friday.
headline: Today is Thursday July 9, in person 10 to 2, Workplace Foundations. DTE storm alert for this afternoon into Friday, keep an eye on it. Friday is already virtual and async.

week1.tag: No power at the Branch after Friday's storm
week1.note: Canceled. Orientation moves to Wednesday. Everyone still gets paid for this day. Families were notified the night of July 6.

week1.tag: Done. Orientation plus U.S. DOL, in person 10 to 2
week1.note: Done. This was the first day. Orientation with Jermaine and Je'Tina, the U.S. Department of Labor (Mildred Kress) on wages and workplace rights, then AI Day Part 1 and Part 2.

sessions.activity: AI Day Part 1 — What AI Really Is
AI Day Part 2 — Resume From Zero

week1.note: Today. Fully built. The 11–12 slot (was DTE) can take any built AI work-readiness session. Ethics Court and Time Management each have a guide and deck ready.

sessions.activity: Slot a built session (Interview / Job Post / Decode)

doNow.title: Pick today's 11 AM slot
doNow.desc: Thursday is fully built. The 11–12 slot can take any built AI work-readiness session: Interview, Job Post, or Decode. Ethics Court and Time Management are set for the afternoon. Just pick the 11 AM one. All in Curriculum/Week 1.

doNow.title: Watch the weather today and Friday
doNow.desc: DTE sent a storm alert for this afternoon into Friday. Last Friday's storm took the Branch's power and cost us Tuesday. Thursday is in person 10 to 2, so have a backup plan if power drops. Friday is already virtual and async, so that day is covered either way.

doNow.title: Get the 15 youth into the GDYT Empower App
doNow.desc: Kelsey at Connect Detroit sent the app sign-up reminder with a youth instructions deck. The app's modules also satisfy the GDYT financial literacy requirement, and it's separate from payroll. Connect Detroit will send weekly emails showing who still needs to register, so get everyone in early.

doNow.title: Lock Week 4 dates
doNow.desc: Tasha CPR, Keosha, Zipporah — pick the days.

doNow.title: Confirm the two bounced families are set for the rest
doNow.desc: Two addresses bounced on the July 6 all-family email. First day has passed. Confirm both families by text or call that they have the schedule for the remaining weeks. One of the two also has a working gmail on the same thread.

waiting.name: Monique Johnson (DTE)
waiting.note: New DTE presenter, Mark connected her. You emailed her Jul 2. She is not free Week 1, so DTE moves to a later week. No reply yet (DTE had a big storm/outage over the weekend).

waiting.note: Checking her schedule for the Financial Wellness session (Week 2 or 4).

waiting.name: GDYT payroll pivot
waiting.note: MOF isn't ready for Payroll 1. Agencies report hours instead; Nicole Hill sends a customized sheet. Connect Detroit ran payroll trainings June 30 and July 7 (refresher). Watch for the sheet, be ready for Payroll 2.

waiting.name: GDYT Empower App
waiting.note: Kelsey (Connect Detroit) sent app sign-up instructions Jul 6, with a youth how-to deck attached. Youth register in the Empower App; its modules cover the GDYT financial literacy requirement (separate from payroll). Connect Detroit sends weekly emails flagging who still needs to register.

needs.name: Shantael Harbin
needs.note: SEL confirmed, invoice sent. Pay the $1,500.

closed.name: Week 1 logistics sent to families
closed.note: All-family email went out the night of July 6: no Tuesday, start Wednesday July 8, 10 to 2, bring a device, Tuesday pay covered. Two addresses bounced on July 7, follow up with those two families by phone.

closed.name: DTE reply sent
closed.note: Emailed Monique + Mark on Jul 2 with the full picture, open to her schedule.

closed.name: Kamilia, Micah, Keosha

items.title: First day is behind us
items.desc: Wednesday opened the program: orientation with you and Je'Tina, the DOL at 11, then AI Day Part 1 and 2. Thursday is Workplace Foundations, in person 10 to 2. Tuesday stayed off for the power outage and everyone was paid.
